title: ClearPoints Command
description: ClearPoints initializes the position data area for the current robot. Use this instruction to erase point definitions which reside in memory before teaching new points.
see_also:
Plist

ClearPoints Statement Example

The example below shows simple examples of using the ClearPoints command (from the command Window). Notice that no teach points are shown when initiating the Plist command once the ClearPoints command is given.

>P1=100,200,-20,0/R

>P2=0,300,0,20/L

>Plist

P1=100,200,-20,0/R

P2=0,300,0,20/L

>clearpoints

>Plist

>
